limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific capex or infrastructure spend disclosed in excerpts; TEL is a components supplier to AI infrastructure customers, not a direct AI infrastructure investor — generic language used for its own AI investment posture.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Quantified revenue results tied to AI demand are present (72.6% organic growth in digital data networks attributed to AI/cloud), but these reflect customer-driven demand rather than TEL's own AI deployments; scored 4 as deployed business results with quantified outcomes are disclosed.
capex_mentions: No dollar amounts tied to AI/compute/data-center investment by TEL itself found in excerpts.
